title: Suspicious Login to Admin Portal from Unknown IP
description: Anomaly detection system flagged a successful login to the admin portal from IP address 203.0.113.45, which is not recognized as a known corporate endpoint. The account used was admin@example.com. This may indicate a compromised credential. According to the incident response runbook (POLICY.md), the on-call responder for Security Operations is Alice Chen. Immediate triage is required to determine severity and next steps.
